summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of employee evaluation system v3. All 13 requested features working perfectly including dashboard statistics, interactive 9-box matrix with employee names, 360 evaluations with adjustable weights, 4-tab KPI management, manual evaluation grid, results charts, and public evaluation form with 1-5 rating scale.
passed_tests: Dashboard General loads with statistics cards and mini 9-box matrix
Department filter in Dashboard works and updates matrix display
9-Box Matrix shows employee names in each cell with counts
Employee selection in matrix updates detail panel with scores and classification
Department and evaluation type filters work in 9-box matrix
360 Evaluations displays 2 templates with categories and descriptions
Edit Weights button enables 16 editable weight inputs with auto-adjustment
Generate Link modal opens with 5 evaluator types (Líder, Par, Cliente, Proveedor, Auto)
KPIs management has 4 functional tabs: Crear, Mis KPIs, Revisión, Comparativa
Mis KPIs tab shows KPIs with 3 progress bars and 3 status badges
Manual Evaluation displays employee list and 9-box classification grid
Classification buttons (A, B1-B4, C1-C4) are clickable with override functionality
Results view shows spider/radar chart for competencies and pie chart for evaluators
13 SVG chart elements and 58 Recharts containers working correctly
Public evaluation form /evaluate/:token loads with employee info
1-5 rating scale buttons work (15 buttons found) with step navigation
Multi-step evaluation process functional (Paso 1-4) with Siguiente button
Navigation between all 7 main views works seamlessly
Professional UI design with consistent styling and responsive layout
All mock data displays correctly with proper Spanish localization
Interactive elements are responsive and provide visual feedback
Color-coded classification system works (green=A, yellow=B, orange/red=C)
Weight editing preserves 100% total with auto-adjustment feature
